title: Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu Lyrics Vadacurry Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu
Singer(s): Priya Hemesh, Sathyan
Movie: Vadacurry
Music: Yuvan
Lyrics: Niranjan Bharathi

Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu kalandhaal
idhayam irupadhu vinvelithaney.
Idharkku per enna kadhaley
indha nilai varakkaranam neethaaney.
unakkaaga nenjam saayumey
adhuthaan kadavul varamey.

Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu kalandhaal
idhayam irupadhu vinvelithaney.
Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu kalandhaal

Nodiyedhum theriyaamal
vizhigal rendum pesudhey.
Vizhiyodu vizhi serndhaal
pudhiya mozhi thonudhey.

Vali kooda sugam thaaney
idhu kadhal mugam thaaney.
Rasithaenadi dhinam dhinam.

Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu kalandhaal
idhayam irupadhu vinvelithaney.
Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu kalandhaal

Veyilodu mazhai thoova
paruvangalai maathinaai.
vizhi irandinil medhuvaaga
undadhu eeram oottrinaal.

Indha kadhal kadandhaaley
..dhegam thulithaney.
Azhaipayudhey manam manam.

Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu kalandhaal
idhayam irupadhu vinvelithano.
Idharkku per enna kadhaley
indha nilai varakkaranam neethaaney.
unakkaaga nenjam saayumey
adhuthaan kadavul varamey.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu'?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings, emphasizing the connection between two souls and the emotions that arise from love.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Vadacurry'?

In Vadacurry, this song highlights a pivotal romantic moment, showcasing the lead characters' emotional bond.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Priya Himesh and Sathyan, whose voices blend beautifully to create a romantic vibe.

Who composed the music for 'Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu'?

The music for this song was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique style and captivating melodies.

When was 'Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu' released?

The song was released on April 17, 2014, as part of the Vadacurry soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu', the song beautifully encapsulates the essence of love and longing. Set against the backdrop of the movie Vadacurry, it portrays the emotional connection between the lead characters. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of romance and intimacy. This duet by Priya Himesh and Sathyan, under Yuvan's direction, resonates with anyone who has experienced the joys and pains of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Uyirin Melloru Uyir Vanthu from the movie Vadacurry beautifully captures the essence of love with its enchanting melodies. The collaboration between Priya Himesh and Sathyan, under the masterful direction of Yuvan, creates a romantic atmosphere that resonates deeply. This song is a heartfelt expression of emotions, making it a must-listen for anyone in love.
stanzaMeanings: When two souls unite, the heart becomes like the shining sun. This is called love, and you are the reason for this state. My heart will rest for you, that is when God will come.
When two souls unite, the heart becomes like the shining sun. When two souls unite.
Without knowing, both eyes speak to each other. When the eyes meet, a new language appears.
Even pain feels good, this is the face of love. I enjoy it every day.
When two souls unite, the heart becomes like the shining sun. When two souls unite.
The rain with the sun changes the seasons. In the eyes, there is a beauty that comes from the warmth of love.
This love, when it passes, the body melts away. It brings tears to the heart.
When two souls unite, the heart becomes like the shining sun. This is called love, and you are the reason for this state. My heart will rest for you, that is when God will come.
